svg.title: Neuroid Phase 2 — frontend migrated to CloudFront + S3, backend EC2 unchanged
svg.desc: Frontend tier replaced with CloudFront CDN and S3 static hosting. Backend EC2 with auto scaling and Flask remains unchanged behind an internet-facing ALB. Data in DynamoDB, S3, SQLite. CloudWatch error-alarm Lambda notifies Slack.

g.text: Flask · AI pipeline · Auto Scaling CPU 50%
